title: Qorus-Infosys Finacle Banking Innovation Awards 2025 Winners Announced
detailed_summary: Infosys Finacle, part of EdgeVerve Systems, and Qorus announced the winners of the 12th Qorus-Infosys Finacle Banking Innovation Awards in Athens. The 2025 edition recognized 30 financial institutions across nine categories, based on 320 submissions from 130 financial institutions in 53 countries. The announcement is primarily an awards update and is not material for long-term investors.
